path.description: URL path the engine exposes for inbound webhook deliveries.

signature.description: HMAC signature verification. Omit when using auth_header_name instead.

header.description: HTTP header that carries the signature, e.g. X-Hub-Signature-256.

version.description: Optional prefix used in the header value, e.g. 'v1' for Stripe.

rotation_credential_ref.description: Secondary credential accepted during secret rotation grace period.

rotation_grace_period.description: How long to accept both primary and rotation secrets, e.g. '1h'.

auth_header_name.description: Header name for static-value auth (e.g. X-Simulator-Auth). Used instead of HMAC when the provider forwards a fixed token (e.g. Tripletex).

auth_header_credential_ref.description: Credential ref for the expected value of auth_header_name.

fan_out.description: Event-type discriminator and per-datatype route mapping.

discriminator.description: Body field whose value identifies the event type. Mutually exclusive with discriminator_header; discriminator_header takes precedence.

discriminator_header.description: HTTP request header that carries the event type (e.g. X-SuperOffice-Event). Avoids a body parse before auth verification.

datatype.description: Connector datatype to route matched events into.

notification_only.description: When true, the payload is a notification reference only; trigger a single-record fetch instead of a direct upsert. Mutually exclusive with is_delete; is_delete takes precedence.

notification_external_id_field.description: Top-level payload field holding the external record ID for notification-only payloads.

is_delete.description: When true, the route match IS a deletion signal. The engine annotates the full payload with _deleted:true and upserts it. _extract_external_id handles both simple PKs (primary_key: id) and compound PKs (primary_key: [fromObjectId, toObjectId]) transparently. Takes precedence over notification_only. E.g. 'contact.deletion' (HubSpot), 'customer.delete' (Tripletex), 'association.deletion' (HubSpot).

unmatched.description: What to do when no route matches the discriminator value.

array_unwrap.description: When true, the POST body is expected to be a JSON array of event objects; the engine unwraps it and dispatches each element independently. Required for HubSpot which batches multiple events in one POST.

registration.description: Active webhook lifecycle management — register/renew/deregister subscriptions with the source system.

register_path.description: Path to POST to in order to create a subscription.

deregister_path.description: Path to DELETE to remove a subscription. Use ${webhook_id} placeholder.

renew_path.description: Path to PUT/PATCH to renew a subscription. Use ${webhook_id} placeholder.

health_check_path.description: Path to GET to verify a subscription is still active.

health_check_active_field.description: Dot-notation path into the health-check response JSON whose value must equal health_check_active_value for the subscription to be considered active. When absent, only the HTTP status code is checked. Example: 'value.status' (Tripletex).

health_check_active_value.description: Expected value at health_check_active_field. Must be set explicitly when health_check_active_field is used (no default).

id_response_path.description: Dot-notation path to extract the webhook ID from the registration response, e.g. 'value.id'.

callback_url_runtime_param.description: Body field name for the engine's inbound URL in the registration POST.

per_route_registration.description: When true, POST once per fan_out route (one subscription per event type). Used by Tripletex.

register_body_extra.description: Extra body fields for the registration POST. Supports ${route_event} and ${credential:<ref>} placeholders.

register_headers_extra.description: Extra HTTP headers for the registration POST. Same placeholder support as register_body_extra.

register_events_field.description: When set, collect all fan_out route match values into an array and include under this key in a single registration POST (SuperOffice 'Events' array pattern).

event_id_field.description: Payload field holding a unique event ID for idempotency / deduplication.

dedup_ttl.description: How long to remember seen event IDs, e.g. '24h'.

ip_allowlist.description: CIDR ranges from which deliveries are accepted. Restricts beyond any server-wide allowlist.

rate_limit_per_minute.description: Per-connector inbound rate limit. null inherits the server-wide default.
